message:
Fix lint warnings across tests, scripts, E2E, and reference files

Formatting and lint fixes across the broader codebase:

Tests:
- Sort imports alphabetically (beads-filter-parity test)
- Use template literals instead of string concat (update-checker,
  cli-logging, robot-api-conformance tests)
- Remove unused imports and variables (deterministic test utils)

Scripts:
- Clean up unused imports in flywheel.ts, flywheel-update.ts,
  generate-checksums.ts, coverage-matrix test

E2E:
- Fix lint warnings in e2e-reporter, logging, reporter modules
- Clean up agent-lifecycle, dcg-block-approve, ntm-ingest-ws-bridge,
  ntm-integration specs

Reference:
- Fix lint in ntm robot scripts (is-working.ts, smart-restart.ts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -76,7 +76,7 @@ async function terminateAgentViaAPI(
  * Collect WebSocket messages for a given channel until a condition is met
  * or timeout expires.
  */
-function collectWSMessages(
+function _collectWSMessages(
   wsUrl: string,
   channel: string,
   opts?: { timeoutMs?: number; count?: number },
